001
002/**
003 * Décrivez votre classe Item ici.
004 *
005 * @author Raphaël Quillaud
006 * @version 18/04/26
007 */
008public class Item {
009    private String aDescription;
010    private int aWeight;
011    private String aName;
012
013    public Item(final String pName,final String pDescription, final int pWeight) {
014        this.aName = pName;
015        this.aDescription = pDescription;
016        this.aWeight = pWeight;
017    }
018
019    public String getName() {
020        return this.aName;
021    }
022
023    public String getDescription() {
024        return this.aDescription;
025    }
026
027    public int getWeight() {
028        return this.aWeight;
029    }
030
031    public String getLongDescription() {
032        return this.aName + " : " + this.aDescription + " (" + this.aWeight + " kg)";
033    }
034} // Item
